dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Has decorative cartouche in lower left featuring people, lions, and an elephant.
Appears in Atlas. Amsterdam : apud Fredericum de Wit, [1680?] (Map no. 3 in an edition with 51 maps).
